The '''Combat Attack Transport (C.A.T.)''' was a model of combat vehicle deployed at the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. It was one of the few vehicles [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]; in the case of the Battle of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], it was piloted by [[Cold assault stormtrooper|snowtroopers]]. It was armed with two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].<ref name="SSW:TESB" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]''
